message: BPF program exceeds verifier instruction budget
notes: cause: The verifier walks all reachable paths in the program and gives up after one million insns (the kernel default). The program either has too much straight-line code, too many branches expanding the path count, or a loop that the verifier is unrolling instead of bounding via bpf_loop.

; deeply_unrolled_pipeline(events);
0: R1=ctx() R10=fp0
1: (b7) r2 = 0
2: (b7) r3 = 0
BPF program is too large. Processed 1000001 insn (verification failed)
suggest: Factor the program into smaller pieces using tail-calls or `bpf_loop` to fold repeated work into a bounded iteration. Avoid macro-expanded unrolled loops; prefer explicit bounded loops the verifier can analyze structurally.
